consentModal.description: I hate cookies as much as you. I am only using them for error reporting and performance monitoring.

sections.title: Cookie Usage
sections.description: We use cookies to store your decks and your game room so we don't have to use a server for it. We also use cookies for error and performance tracking. We don't have any marketing or ad cookies.

sections.title: Necessary Cookies Always Enabled
sections.description: Used to store decks, hand, room ID, and current board state.

sections.title: Error Logging & Analytics
sections.description: Used to alert me when someone runs into a bug and allows me to see what led to the bug. Also allows me to track how many people use the site.

sections.title: More information
sections.description: For any query in relation to my policy on cookies and your choices, please contact me on Discord.
